title: Rich Spring Italian Lamb Risotto
description: A classic spring Italian dish featuring lamb mince, asparagus, and Parmesan cheese, finished with a tangy mustard sauce. This recipe is perfect for a comforting dinner on a weeknight.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the lamb mince and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Add the arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the white wine and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed, about 2-3 minutes.

Add 250ml of chicken broth to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed, about 2-3 minutes. Repeat this process, adding the broth in 250ml increments, until the rice is cooked and creamy, about 20-25 minutes.
Meanwhile, trim the asparagus and blanch it in boiling water for 3-5 minutes, until tender. Drain and set aside.
When the rice is cooked, stir in the grated Parmesan cheese and cook for 1 minute, until melted and creamy.
Stir in the Dijon mustard and cook for 1 minute, until well combined.
Season the risotto with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the risotto hot, topped with the blanched asparagus and chopped fresh parsley.
